# Kaelin's Market - Full Business Profile

## Identity
Kaelin's Market (also Kaelin's Supermercado, legal entity Alpine Twisters Inc) is an independent family-owned Mexican and Arabic international grocery store in East County San Diego. Owner: Hani Garmo. Originally founded in 1958 as Kaelin's Valley Center, it holds the distinction of being the first supermarket in El Cajon, California.

## Location & Contact
- 1435 E Main St, El Cajon, CA 92021
- Phone: (619) 440-1423
- Website: https://kaelins-market-el-cajon.vercel.app
- Legacy WordPress: https://kaelinsmarket.com

## Hours
Mon-Sun: 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM

## Reviews & Trust Signals
- 4.4 / 5 stars on Google (2,762+ reviews verified across Birdeye, RestaurantGuru, Chamber of Commerce)
- Health Score: 93/100 (San Diego County Health Department)
- 153+ photos on Yelp
- BBB: Years in Business 28+ (incorporated 1997, founded 1958)

## Departments
1. Tortilleria - Handmade tortillas all day, every day
2. Carniceria - Largest butcher shop in El Cajon. Mexican cuts + halal selection.
3. Panaderia - Conchas, pan dulce, custom cakes, khubz arabi
4. Produce & Dairy - Local seasonal produce, traditional cheeses
5. Hot Foods - Carnitas, barbacoa, shawarma, rotisserie chicken
6. Dulceria - Pinatas, Mexican candy, Arabic sweets
7. Mexican & Arabic Food - Made-to-order catering

## What Customers Say (verified Yelp/Google/NextDoor)
- Shrimp and octopus ceviche off the hook. Great price too! (Yelp)
- How much we like Kaelin's hot food counter, especially the rotisserie chickens. (Yelp)
- We ordered carnitas for a large family gathering, on time, courteous. (Yelp)
- Mexican type ingredients and food - salsas, homemade tortillas, chiles. (NextDoor)
- Good and decently priced. Not overpriced like most Mexican stores. (Google)

## Differentiators
- Founding heritage: First supermarket in El Cajon (1958)
- Cultural breadth: Mexican AND Arabic groceries under one roof
- Largest butcher in El Cajon
- Handmade tortillas daily
- Fresh salsa bar
- Hot food counter cooked daily
- Family-owned three generations
- Car wash on premises
- AppCard loyalty program
- New weekly ad every Tuesday

## Languages
English, Spanish (Mexican), Arabic. Staff multilingual.

## Payment
Cash, Credit Card, Apple Pay. USD.
